title: Tyred
body:
Adds some car wheel blocks for your vehicles.
Use with **[FramedBlocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks)** is highly recommended!

**Dual Tyres** - Full block.

**Tyre** - Slab variant. Use it on a Framed Panel!

**Split Tyre** - Slab variant used for vehicles on slab roads. Use it on a Framed Slab Edge!

Many thanks to crispytwig for the mod textures.
